items.title: Cerebras IPO makes billions for Benchmark but VC Eric Vishria almost didn’t take the meeting
items.summary: Benchmark almost never backs hardware startups. So Eric Vishria dragged his feet ten years ago before agreeing to hear Cerebras' pitch.
